/bin/c++  -std=gnu++17 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/waifu2x-converter-cpp.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/waifu2x-converter-cpp.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/waifu2x-converter-cpp.dir/src/tstring.cpp.o" -o waifu2x-converter-cpp  -Wl,-rpath,/root/waifu2x-converter-cpp/build: libw2xc.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.10.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.10.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.10.0 -ldl -lpthread
